# [Phase 3] WAKE_SUBSCRIPTION Schema and Tool Surface

**Origin Session ID:** `27016011-8ae9-48bb-af87-9479dd5b0fd0`

## Intent
Implement `WAKE_SUBSCRIPTION` schema migration and tool surface for the Phase 3 autonomous wake substrate, per **ADR 0002**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Define graph-resident `WAKE_SUBSCRIPTION` node schema.
- [ ] Implement `manage_wake_subscription` MCP tool surface (`subscribe`, `unsubscribe`, `update`, `list`, `resync`).
- [ ] Ensure subscription capability detection routes correctly to `harnessTarget` (MCP, A2A webhook, bridge, disabled).
- [ ] Build against the contract defined in `learn/agentos/decisions/0002-phase3-wake-substrate-standards-alignment.md` §6.6.
